mapper.select:
SELECT sub.id, sub.name AS name, sub.type, sub.icon, ui.name as userName, ui.images as userImages FROM categories sub left join user_info ui on (ui.id = sub.user_id) WHERE 1 = 1
AND ui.name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryFrom.userName},'%')
AND ui.user_id = #{queryFrom.userId}
ORDER BY sub.id DESC
